messages.subject: [R] sib TDT transmission/disequilibrium test
messages.body_plain:
"Farrel Buchinsky" <fjbuch at gmail.com> wrote:
>
> Does anyone know if the sib TDT has been implemented in R
>
> 1. Spielman, R.S., and Ewens, W.J. (1998) A sibship test for linkage in the
> presence of association: the sib transmission/disequilibrium test. Am J Hum
> Genet 62, 450-458
>

It can be done as a conditional logistic regression (look at clogit).  I don't
think the sib TDT is as efficient as an FBAT approach, which can be applied to
that type of data.

David Duffy.
